calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2012 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Prove-Up Hearing And, In The Alternative, Judgment On The Paper, Under The Destroyed Land Records Relief Law
Off Calendar Oct-30-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing and In The Alternative, Judgment On The Papers, Under The Destroyed Land Records Relief Law.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Sophia Belloli, Esq. Appearing for Plaintiff 900 Folsom Street, LLC, A Delaware Limited Liability Company.
Witness Benjamin Ron sworn and examinded.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s)All Persons Claiming Any Interest in, or Lien Upon, the Real Property Herein discribed, or Any Part Thereof
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

1. On February 14, 2012, the date of commencement of this action, 900 Folsom was the owner in fee simple absolute, and in the actual and peaceable possession as owner of all the real property commonly known as 900 Folsom Street in San Francisco, between Folsom and Clementina Street, including the 2-inch gap properly described in Exhibit B, attached hereto.
2. On June 15, 2012, after the commencement of this action, 900 Folsom LLC conveyed the 900 Folsom Property, including the 2-inch title-gap property described in Exhibit B, to Essex SF Owner, L.P. as described in the deed to the property attached as Exhibit C hereto.
3. Essex SF Owner, L.P.'s title to the 2-ich title gap as described in Exhibit B, is established and quieted to the world.
4. Nothing in this judgment shall be held to prejudice in any manner the rights or interests acquired by any person in the property from or through 900 Folsom, including Essex SF Owner, L.P., subsequent to the commencement of this action.
5. All persons other than Essex SF Owner, L. P. are perpetually barred, enjoined and estopped from asserting or setting up any estate, right, title interest of claim in and to the 2-ich title gap property, and any part thereof, whether legal or equitable, present or future, vested or contingent, or mortgages of liesn of any description.
Court signed Judgment in open court.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Prove-Up Hearing And, In The Alternative, Judgment On The Paper, Under The Destroyed Land Records Relief Law
